title: beauty
content:
- Beauty is in the eye of the beholder
- What exactly is beauty? Does it mean a certain attraction to something or submitting to laws we can neither fight nor deny
- Is beauty something we surrender to?

title: Conversations with myself
content:
> I was walking on the road having a conversation with myself and I had an idea to put them in writing instead. It was a conversation about myself.
> - I said I was tired of existence, but does that mean I'm suicidal. NO.. life is to precious for me to take my own. That would be a bad decision and I like making those
> - No need to bring up God though, he only helps those who help themselves. 
> - I should have faith you say
> - God helps those who believe in him. Well the previous statement puts doubts in my head. Y'know they always say faith without action is pointless, so do I seem faithful to you anymore
> I saw a previous comment I made in this book, I'm no longer floating, it made me wonder what changed. Was I better or worse before? What was I like before? I've been called a lot of things before; nonchalant, robotic, emotion-less, no conscience, apathetic. So wrote that I wasn't as indifferent to everything as before, but was I really or did I just distract myself from it.
> I'm going to be 20 soon but I'm not independent nor have an idea of my future. I'll be old enough to be an uncle yet this evokes no reaction from me. I switched to blue cause there were only black ball-point pens. It feels like my adolescent years were wasted. I haven't grown much.
> I took up poetry for a bit. A total of 32 poems or about that amount. I ultimately stopped because I had nothing to express or wasn't able to put it into words. I started it initially as a way to express my thoughts cause I don't journal them but I started to post them online at the mention of a friend. It ended becoming something I now do for other people to see and comment. I wanted views, comments, feedback, to become better at expressing myself for other people to see. Now I don't think of poetry like before. I might still write more someday maybe to enter a contest or just cause
> I thought about it and I guess one of the reasons I don't consider immortality a curse is because I live without care for the passage of time. The past has become a blur filled with memories of nostalgia, while the future is uncertain and ignored with indifference. In a novel I was reading once the main character said there's a thin line between a blessing and a curse so he was able to take a technique that took all his pain and acted as curse to one that represented his memories with his love and acted as a blessing [A regressor's tale of cultivation]
> In a conversation I had with my sister, she mentioned that my mum saw my about and made a comment saying 'Tobi can even dream that's good'. My about was a quote from Don Quixote - 'To forsake dreams... That may be madness'. Sadly to disappoint those who thought otherwise I'm wrought with madness. The poem I wrote, [[The boy who flew]], was about(based) on me though it was written in the third person and it's end is tragic.

title: life
content:
- Over the years, I have learnt many things and gained experience and knowledge from books, life, and the people around me. I have realised that in life you must always be able to see the big picture, and your attitude to everything and perseverance in achieving your goal is crucial. 
	- If you don't have a goal you just tend to drift through life... floating. You need to make every 24 hrs count and own your life... take control. Persevere and discipline yourself in all parts of your life be it in academics, sports, music or your social life. 
- A life with focus is one that is going somewhere
- Discipline & perseverance are much needed traits
- Hard work overtakes talent when talent doesn't work hard
- Live your life like you own it cause god gave it to you
- Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard
	- To me this statement can be interpreted in many ways 
	- I prefer this one - Talent isn't a god given gift or some divine spark. It is something that is sought out and found.
	- To me talent coincides with continuous determination and hard work (This statement is better and doesn't have much controversy)
- Deliberate practice is a different framework from practice makes perfect
	- It is the activity designed specifically to improve performance, often with a teacher's help; it pushes the practitioner just beyond his/her current limits; it's highly demanding mentally, whether the activity is purely intellectual or heavily physical; and isn't much fun
	- Practice should be done and meditated on. Thinking about areas of good and bad performance; then setting a practice routine for it
	- Practice and get feedback continuously 
- Making a plan for the future should be done constantly

title: love
content:
- I've been crushed before.. got over it when I saw her again after a long while. So yeah all's good
- Absence makes the heart fonder
- Every time I saw her nothing else mattered. She was the only thing there while everything faded away
- If you begin to see somebody more or notice them more. It probably means you've become more aware of the person likely because something happened
- Relationships don't have to be difficult. Just talk to each other and sort your shit out. And for god's sake don't start assuming shit, avoiding each other, and stuff. If you really like each other talk about your problems. Also don't shout or make things difficult just calm down and think.
- "Cause if you love someone, and your not afraid to lose them. You probably never loved someone like I do"
- I've thought about and the term 'True love' is a load of bull

title: money
content:
- I wanna be wealthy not rich
- Wealth is the no. of days you can last with your cashflow. It is having a steady and high cashflow annually or monthly.
- Wealth just keeps increasing while riches can be spent and wasted
-

title: myself
content:
- I felt incomplete and I was floating. I don't really like floating
- Sigh... I have quite a number of regrets but I guess everybody does
- I need to stop this and actually change
- I'm bored I got nothing to do. I feel like talking to someone but... hmm
- 'Chienne de vie' one of my new French terms
- [[2020-08-20]] 
- I don't know what's changed but I no longer feel like I'm floating all the time. I don't feel as indifferent to everything as before
- I refuse to remain lazy. Hard work shall be my mantra
- [[Conversations with myself]]

title: random stuff
content:
- Stare into the abyss and it stares right back at you
	- To see the secrets of the universe through one's eyes or someone else's or to peer into the endless cycle of life, death and religion to gain knowledge beyond conception and apotheosis
- Ignorance is truly bliss
- Talented is overrated (book and a thought)
- To attain superior perception is a dream come true
- The human body temp. is 38 degrees Celsius
- How do you become a reliable best friend
- Fermat's last theorem should be checked out
- Social anxiety my greatest enemy
- Fix wardrobe after Yr 12
- Work on handwriting
- If you can inflict physical pain on yourself does that make you strong or weak?
- Work on starting plantations
- Pray more often
- God creates an immovable object; If he moves it he is not omnipotent cause it moved and is no longer immovable. If he can't move it he can't do everything
- I need to get some jeans and trousers
- Everything is a controversy even the word controversy

[Timestamp::1:08] 
- Fuck! my head hurts and I've been reading physics. Sometimes it doesn't feel like I'm writing WAEC even though you know you are writing the exam you can't help but find it hard to take it seriously.
- I can't help but wish I could listen to music. I think about the time I was depressed during the holiday (well not really a holiday), I had my music to help me now all I have is me playing cradles in my head.
- I killed a spider. I wonder why it felt somehow (weird)

[Timestamp::12:55]
- The pain in my head comes and goes now & I can't help but wonder whether I annoyed Vanessa and Bassey. Physics practical exam was ok wasn't as hard as I thought it would be.
- I wonder if I should tell them sorry... nah. I'm so hungry I haven't eaten since, plus should I ask Samuel for paracetamol?
- Sometimes I try to stop thinking and shut my mind. I don't like the thoughts I get sometimes. *sigh* got to prepare for further maths mock
[Timestamp::22:05]
- Some guys were gisting in my room. Manchang kept getting the most shots, they said his problem is due to lack of babe. It really hurts to laugh sometimes. The guys shipped Uchenna and Amarachi said she was the reason he came to IFY block

- First Daily note
- I'll be trying to document my thoughts here from now on
- Transferring my thoughts that I documented in the notepad vanessa gave me for my birthday to a note in the vault
- Hello journal, today Ire messaged me. I'm smiling at the thought of it, I shouldn't be

- I've messed up and I don't know what to do
- When your not pro-active opportunities tend to slip by

- I don't really need a yandere girlfriend or someone obsessed about me. Just having someone supports me and I support them is fine. 
- It such a wonderful thing being able to recognise someone's care for you and being able to show others you care for them
- So then what do you do when you can't recognise those things but remain ignorant and indifferent. What do you do when you feel like you don't care about anyone. Your just acting based on surface level feelings and what your relationship is supposed to look like
- I'm lonely but I'm not alone | I'm alone but not lonely
- Switching between the two statements every now and then I can't help but wonder which one I'd like to remain
- Missed messages is a great game. I love May
- I guess you could say she's my new fictional crush but she's not really. I just wish the best for her. I've gotten the suicide ending twice. First time on my second playthrough unintentionally and second time to see her room
- I can't bring myself to do it ever again. She's a lovely girl who cared/s a lot about the character. 
- I can't help but wonder if I'm the same as the character missing things. I don't notice or pay attention to the emotions people display beyond what's visible or publicly displayed. Everything's just taken for granted or not acknowledge
- I couldn't even complete when of the tasks for the document Aunty bola asked me for help with. She had documented that her client tended to minimise the significance of certain interactions and I couldn't find a timestamp for that occurring.
- I watched the video many times but couldn't notice anything. I wasn't much help for that assignment
- I wonder if I've had too many fictional crushes, they're not particularly large in number but they always end after a while and there's always a new one when I find another character that meets the requirements 
- I don't even know what basis I use to judge. Yandere, wholesome, lovely, crazy, beautiful, I don't know
- I find it weird I even still think about finding a girlfriend and being in-love 
- I had one before, a friend that I confessed to for some reason. Don't remember what exactly prompted it anymore. I came to the conclusion that I truly loved her after a single teardrop fell when we broke up.
- I don't know if I did. Maybe I did, maybe I didn't but my opinion keeps changing every now and then. It makes me more inclined to I didn't
- I decided that I was done with love after that, never again. I don't care about anyone that much to love them like that. I'd never meet anyone else like that. 
- I just couldn't see myself magically meeting some random girl by twist of fate and falling in love 
- I can't see myself talking to anyone
- I wonder how I felt about my ex back then. I still care about her now
- She texted me a while back, I said I was happy but I don't think I really was. It felt complicated but not. I found myself thinking about her every now and then. Not like I wasn't doing that before. 
- I went through some pictures I had of her, she was beautiful. She always has been I know a lot of beautiful people. Made her my home screen wallpaper even. I don't think I'll be changing it anytime soon, it's a really nice picture
- I've talked about her to some friends in the past like I had some compulsion to say something even though I think about pretending we never dated
- Sometimes I think about whether I've gotten over her but I don't love her anymore if I ever used to. It feels like I just want her to still be mine out of desire or I never really adapted to not being able to message or call her casually anymore
- Somethings changed and things will never be like they used to. I don't regret it but If I was given the chance now to stop that confession I would
- I wonder what kind of lives my friends have lived. I'm sure I'm part of it but there's a lot more I don't know and I don't bother to find out about. The same goes for my parents and sisters
- That's probably why I think I'll die alone sometimes but I don't mind if I actually do. I just hope I'll be forgotten if that happens. Then I'd die in peace knowing I had no lasting traces in the lives of others 
- I'm actually considering the idea of talking to a therapist more and more now. Not because I have an issue I want to talk about or anything cause I wouldn't know what to say. Like I know I have a lot of issues and I'm flawed. I could even list some but I don't know how to talk about them or bring them up cause I'm always changing. My emotional state never remains the same.
- No I'm considering it because I've seen how they help you with solutions. Possible pathways to take. So I'll find one if I get into Bedfordshire. It would be for focusing on my academic work when I need to and dealing with crutches turned addictions and just addictions in general. It sounds like a nice idea doesn't it.
- It's 03:11 and I'm here typing/journaling I'd go to sleep now but I can't. Don't know what to do now, don't have the desire to do much. Maybe I'll go on a walk and stay outside or something. Yh, I'll do that but I'll read through past notes first. It's one of the reasons I like doing this cause I get to see what my thought process was like before.
- I'm tired now but part of me doesn't want to try and sleep. I don't want to lie down and be left with my thoughts
- I'll leave now for the walk
